words.answer: A sponge can absorb a lot of water.
You need to think before you answer.

words.hint: Spróbuj zapomnieć o tym, co się stało.
words.answer: Try to forget what happened.

words.hint: Nie zgaduj, jeśli nie jesteś pewny.
words.answer: Don’t guess if you’re not sure.

words.hint: Leonardo da Vinci wynalazł wiele urządzeń.
words.answer: Leonardo da Vinci invented many devices.

words.hint: Odkryli nowe gatunki ryb w oceanie.
words.answer: They discovered new species of fish in the ocean.

words.hint: Wziął jeden haust z papierosa i odłożył go.
words.answer: He took a puff from his cigarette and put it down.

words.hint: Po długiej rozmowie doszli do wniosku.
words.answer: After a long talk, they came to a conclusion.

words.hint: Czasem warto się zastanowić nad własnymi decyzjami.
words.answer: Sometimes you should reflect on your own decisions.
The owner of the shop was very kind.
What does it mean?

words.hint: Wzruszył ramionami, bo nie wiedział, co odpowiedzieć.
words.answer: He shrugged because he didn’t know what to say.

words.hint: Masz rację, to naprawdę ważna sprawa.
words.answer: You have a point, this is really important.

words.hint: Ledwo mogła wstać po całym dniu pracy.
words.answer: She could hardly stand up after a long day.
That is a proven fact of science.
Just ignore him.
I don’t want to comment on that.
What was the reason for his absence?

words.hint: Ta historia odnosi się do prawdziwych wydarzeń.
words.answer: This story relates to real events.
The police have been investigating the case for weeks.
We need to figure it out before tomorrow.
The professor gave an interesting lecture.
You shouldn’t attack anyone verbally.

words.hint: Westchnęła z ulgą, gdy usłyszała wiadomość.
words.answer: She sighed with relief when she heard the news.
They like to discuss movies.

words.hint: Uśmiechnął się zagadkowo i nic nie powiedział.
words.answer: He smiled enigmatically and said nothing.
That’s exactly what I thought.
I must admit he was right.
I would rather stay at home.
That’s a rather strange behavior.

words.hint: Był to dobrze znany lekarz fizjolog.
words.answer: He was a well-known physiologist.
He gave a lecture on human anatomy.

words.hint: Wrócił po latach do rodzinnego miasta.
words.answer: He returned to his hometown after years.

words.hint: Stała u jego boku podczas ceremonii.
words.answer: She stood at his side during the ceremony.
He was well-dressed in a suit.
I was truly surprised by the news.
They talked in private.

words.hint: Nie martw się, wszystko będzie dobrze.
words.answer: Don’t worry, everything will be fine.
He is a very trusted friend.
I assisted her in carrying the boxes.
She is engaged to a doctor.
He shook her hand in farewell.

words.hint: To była prawdziwa przyjemność cię poznać.
words.answer: It was a real pleasure to meet you.
Have a seat, please.
Explain it to me once more.
She looked through the documents in a hurry.
We need more background information.
He became a widower at a young age.
She mentioned it only once.

words.hint: Był szanowanym człowiekiem w swojej społeczności.
words.answer: He was a respected man in his community.
